   |
 5 | / message M {
 6 | |     import "foo.proto";
   | |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ this import...
 7 | |     import public "foo.proto";
...  |
11 | | }
   | \_- ...cannot be declared within this message definition
   |
   = help: this import can only appear at file scope
